extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates proceedings against the Company, by the Company, against/by Directors, against/by Promoters, and against/by Subsidiaries. I counted only against rows: criminal matters are Nil against the Company and Directors/Promoters and 2 against Subsidiaries; no statutory/regulatory enforcement row has a non-zero count, and the SEBI matter described separately resulted in no adverse remark against the Company; tax proceedings are 11 against the Company plus 12 against Subsidiaries, excluding all by rows. The quantified aggregate against the Company and Subsidiaries is the sum of tax amounts of ₹202.08 million and ₹257.95 million, or ₹460.03 million = ₹46.003 crore; criminal and other litigation amounts are unquantified/Nil. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated consolidated Total of ₹593.83 million as of June 30, 2020, converted to ₹59.383 crore without re-summing. The only company-wide customer concentration disclosed for the most recent full fiscal year is the ten-largest-clients figure of 52.50% of revenue from operations in Fiscal 2020; no company-wide top-five percentage is stated. Litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
